findings.clause: For the purpose of providing access to and use of the Platform, All Square, as data controller, collects personal data within the following conditions
findings.Explanation: A significant compliance concern is identified in this first party collection/use clause regarding the handling of customer purchase history and order records.
findings.LegalContextSummary: Relevant obligations associated with First Party Collection/Use require adherence to standard data protection principles.

findings.clause: Any disputes arising from or related to this Privacy Policy will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg

findings.LegalContextSummary: Relevant obligations associated with International and Specific Audiences require adherence to standard data protection principles.

findings.clause: Data transfers All Square may resort to third party data processors that are located inside or outside the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg for the purpose of optimizing the Platform (e.g., for IT outsourcing purposes)
findings.Explanation: The described third party sharing/collection practices for customer purchase history and order records are insufficiently detailed and need explicit definitions.
findings.LegalContextSummary: Relevant obligations associated with Third Party Sharing/Collection require compliance with GDPR-36, DPDP-13 and Art.24, Art.36.
findings.DeveloperAction: Audit underlying data systems to ensure alignment with the proposed policy remediation.
findings.PrivacyTeamAction: Review and approve the dynamic remediation patch generated by the Phase 4B engine.
findings.ImmediateRemediation: Specify exact operational boundaries and vendor agreements.
findings.LongTermRemediation: Implement automated governance checks to prevent future Third Party Sharing/Collection regressions.
